cast.name: Romain Cottard
cast.character: Desk Clerk at Hotel de Paris

cast.name: Antal Leisen
cast.character: Room Service at Hotel de Paris

plot outline: A young woman, her uptight step sister and her best friend use their savings for a long anticipated dream trip to Paris, which turns out to be a big disappointment. When they decide to take a break from their lousy tour and duck into the lobby of a luxury hotel, one of them is mistaken for a spoiled British heiress. Before they get the chance to reveal their true identities they are wrapped up in misadventures during a vacation to Monte Carlo instead.
title: Monte Carlo
akas: Des vacances de Princesse: Bienvenue à Monte-Carlo (France)
